---
title: "ephys4"
output: github_document
---
# ephys4 <img src="man/figures/logo.png" align="right" />
## Read, plot and analyse ephys data

<!-- badges: start -->
[![Lifecycle: stable](https://img.shields.io/badge//lifecycle-stable-green.svg)](https://lifecycle.r-lib.org/articles/stages.html#stable)

<!-- badges: end -->

The ephys4 package unifies reading HEKA, Roboocyte, and Hamamatsu files and performs analyses on them.  

```{r setup, message=FALSE, include=FALSE}
lifecycle::badge("stable")
devtools::load_all()

theme_set(cowplot::theme_cowplot())

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "man/figures/", 
  fig.width = 9
)

options(data_files_path = ephysdata::get_examples_path())
library(patchwork)
```

### Package Installation

```{r install_tip, eval=FALSE}
remotes::install_github("NMIephys/ggscalebars")
```



```{r readme_plot}
# read and plot HEKA patch-clamp file
library(ephys4Patchmaster)
herg.plot <- (
  read_PATCHMASTER(ephysdata::examplefile("herg"), exp = 1, ser = 1) %>% 
             ggsweeps() )

herg.plot 
```



```{r drc, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=12, fig.height=8}
herg.plot + scalebars(xunit="sec", yunit="nA")
```
